en_title: Moana 3 Is in the Works, According to The Rock
cn_title: 巨石强森透露《海洋奇缘3》正在开发
subtitle: 大海还没唱完
opus_summary: 道恩·强森在真人版《海洋奇缘》发布会上确认《海洋奇缘3》已在筹备，Jared Bush与Dana Ledoux Miller将继续执笔，但动画制作周期意味着影片还要等几年。

paragraphs.en: Moana 3 is in development at Disney, according to Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.
paragraphs.cn: 据Dwayne「The Rock」Johnson透露，《海洋奇缘3》正在迪士尼开发中。

paragraphs.en: When speaking at a press conference to promote the new live-action Moana film, Johnson confirmed that Moana 3 is actively in the works. According to Variety , the film will be written by Jared Bush and Dana Ledoux Miller, both of whom penned the scripts for Moana 2 and the live-action remake.
paragraphs.cn: Johnson在宣传新版真人电影《海洋奇缘》的发布会上确认，《海洋奇缘3》正在积极推进。据Variety报道，本片将由Jared Bush和Dana Ledoux Miller编剧，两人此前都参与撰写了《海洋奇缘2》和真人翻拍版的剧本。

paragraphs.en: “Yes, we have talked about Moana 3, yes,” Johnson said. “But first, live-action Moana, we’ll let that come out first. We have [the] amazing Jared Bush and Dana Ledoux Miller, who have been our writers… they will pen Moana 3.”
paragraphs.cn: Johnson说：「是的，我们谈过《海洋奇缘3》，是的。但首先是真人版《海洋奇缘》，我们会先让它上映。我们有出色的Jared Bush和Dana Ledoux Miller，他们一直是我们的编剧……他们会执笔《海洋奇缘3》。」

paragraphs.en: Animated movies take quite a while to produce, so it will likely be a few years before this sees the light of day. The live-action remake of Moana is set to hit theaters next weekend, though the trailers haven't been well received . Some have questioned the need to remake a beloved animated movie that is barely a decade old, but How to Train Your Dragon's live-action remake proved that people are, in fact, interested in these kinds of remakes.
paragraphs.cn: 动画电影制作需要相当长时间，所以这部作品大概要过几年才会面世。真人翻拍版《海洋奇缘》定于下周末上映，不过预告片反响并不好。有人质疑是否有必要翻拍一部还不到十年历史、深受喜爱的动画电影，但《驯龙高手》的真人翻拍证明，观众确实对这类翻拍感兴趣。

paragraphs.en: Lilo & Stitch's live-action reimagining also made over $1 billion at the box office last summer. Disney has already put a sequel into development with a summer 2028 release date . Perhaps the live-action Moana film will be one of the first of these live-action remakes to crumble, especially given competition from films like Spider-Man: Brand New Day , Minions & Monsters , and Disney's own Toy Story 5 .
paragraphs.cn: 真人版《星际宝贝》去年夏天也拿下超过10亿美元(约合人民币68亿元)票房。迪士尼已经让续集进入开发，并定下2028年夏季档期。也许真人版《海洋奇缘》会成为这些真人翻拍中最早崩塌的一部，尤其是考虑到它将面对《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》《小黄人与怪兽》，以及迪士尼自家的《玩具总动员5》等电影竞争。

paragraphs.en: Moana 2 also received middling reviews upon release, despite cracking the billion-dollar mark at the box office. IGN gave the sequel a 6/10 in its review: "The ill-conceived Moana 2 is a reminder of what was noteworthy in the original, namely the songs and the humorous supporting characters. While the sequel gets some laughs, it doesn't make the world Moana introduced eight years ago feel richer or more exciting. The few aspects with potential to turn this into a memorable odyssey – including an intriguing new character – are unfortunately stifled."
paragraphs.cn: 《海洋奇缘2》上映后评价也不温不火，尽管票房突破了10亿美元(约合人民币68亿元)大关。IGN在评测中给这部续集打出6/10分：「构思不佳的《海洋奇缘2》提醒人们，原作值得注意的地方到底是什么，也就是歌曲和幽默的配角。虽然续集带来了一些笑点，但它没有让《海洋奇缘》八年前介绍的世界变得更丰富或更令人兴奋。少数本有潜力让这段旅程变得难忘的方面，包括一个有趣的新角色，也遗憾地被压制住了。」

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人，报道游戏、电影等所有娱乐内容。你可以在Twitter上通过@Cade_Onder找到他。
